tasks.context: Orchestrator stops processing queue after first task rejection. Modify task-orchestrator.ts to continue queue processing on rejection, log rejection reason, update task status to 'rejected', and move to next task. Add error handling to prevent queue stall.

Integrate task-complexity-validator.ts into orchestrator workflow. Import validator in task-orchestrator.ts, call validateTaskComplexity() before task execution, reject tasks exceeding limits with clear message. Pre-approved 5 days ago, needs deployment only.

tasks.description: Add complexity validation to backend task endpoint
tasks.context: Backend task-complexity-validator.ts exists but not wired to API. In backend/src/routes/ledger.ts or relevant task creation endpoint, add validateTaskComplexity() call before task acceptance. Reject invalid tasks at API boundary with 400 error.

Create test suite for orchestrator.ts validating: (1) queue continues after rejection, (2) rejected tasks marked correctly, (3) complexity validator integration works. Use existing test patterns from backend/src/middleware/rate-limit-types.test.ts.
